records.question: Which staff member has the first name Kristian and the last name Lynch?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
WHERE staff.staff_first_name = 'Kristian' AND staff.staff_last_name = 'Lynch'
records.pred_sql: SELECT staff.staff_id FROM Staff WHERE staff_first_name = 'Kristian' AND staff_last_name = 'Lynch'

records.question: Who named Kristian is assigned to problems with a log entry description of q and other log details of o in the Infrastructrure and Architecture category?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN problem_category_codes ON problem_log.problem_category_code = problem_category_codes.problem_category_code
WHERE problem_log.log_entry_description = 'q' AND problem_category_codes.problem_category_description = 'Infrastructrure and Architecture' AND staff.staff_first_name = 'Kristian' AND problem_log.other_log_details = 'o'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT s.staff_id 
FROM Staff s 
JOIN Problem_Log pl ON s.staff_id = pl.assigned_to_staff_id 
JOIN Problem_Category_Codes pcc ON pl.problem_category_code = pcc.problem_category_code 
WHERE s.staff_first_name = 'Kristian' 
AND pl.log_entry_description = 'q' 
AND pl.other_log_details = 'o' 
AND pcc.problem_category_description = 'Infrastructure and Architecture'

records.question: Which staff with the last name Berge have problems currently reported to them?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN problem_status_codes ON problem_log.problem_status_code = problem_status_codes.problem_status_code
WHERE staff.staff_last_name = 'Berge' AND problem_status_codes.problem_status_description = 'Reported'
records.pred_sql: SELECT staff.staff_id FROM Staff staff JOIN Problem_Log log ON staff.staff_id = log.assigned_to_staff_id JOIN Problems problem ON log.problem_id = problem.problem_id WHERE staff.staff_last_name = 'Berge' AND problem.date_problem_closed IS NULL

records.question: Which staff member named Lysanne Turcotte has problem log entries dated on or after 1974-09-13 00:37:26?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff

WHERE staff.staff_last_name = 'Turcotte' AND staff.staff_first_name = 'Lysanne' AND problem_log.log_entry_date >= '1974-09-13 00:37:26'
records.pred_sql:

WHERE s.staff_first_name = 'Lysanne' AND s.staff_last_name = 'Turcotte' 
AND pl.log_entry_date >= '1974-09-13 00:37:26'

records.question: Which staff members have problem log entries where the description is exactly 'a' for products with details exactly 'q'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN problems ON problem_log.problem_id = problems.problem_id
JOIN product ON problems.product_id = product.product_id
WHERE problem_log.log_entry_description = 'a' AND product.product_details = 'q'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.staff_id 
FROM Staff s 
JOIN Problem_Log pl ON s.staff_id = pl.assigned_to_staff_id 
JOIN Problems p ON pl.problem_id = p.problem_id 
WHERE pl.log_entry_description = 'a' 
AND p.product_id IN (SELECT product_id FROM Product WHERE product_details = 'q')

records.question: Who are the staff members assigned to problems where other_log_details is exactly c?

records.question: Which staff members are assigned to problems where the other problem details are exactly p and the problem description is exactly x?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN problems ON problem_log.problem_id = problems.problem_id
JOIN product ON problems.product_id = product.product_id
WHERE problems.other_problem_details = 'p' AND problems.problem_description = 'x'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Staff.staff_id 
FROM Problem_Log 
JOIN Problems ON Problem_Log.problem_id = Problems.problem_id 
WHERE Problems.other_problem_details = 'p' AND Problems.problem_description = 'x'

AND s.staff_last_name = 'Weber' 
AND p.date_problem_reported <= '1996-04-19 15:54:13' 
AND p.date_problem_closed >= '1974-09-20 13:42:19' 
AND pr.product_details = 'q'

SELECT s.staff_id 
FROM Staff s 
JOIN Problem_Log pl ON s.staff_id = pl.assigned_to_staff_id 
JOIN Problems p ON pl.problem_id = p.problem_id 
WHERE s.staff_last_name = 'Berge' 
AND pl.problem_status_code = 'Reported' 
AND pl.log_entry_description = 'p' 
AND pl.log_entry_date = '1993-06-21 22:33:35' 
AND pl.log_entry_fix = 'i'

records.question: Which staff member named Magali was assigned to fix a problem described as y on November 12, 2011 at 23:30:53 for the product learn, with the log entry fix marked as s?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN problems ON problem_log.problem_id = problems.problem_id
JOIN product ON problems.product_id = product.product_id
WHERE product.product_name = 'learn' AND staff.staff_first_name = 'Magali' AND problems.problem_description = 'y' AND problem_log.log_entry_date = '2011-11-12 23:30:53' AND problem_log.log_entry_fix = 's'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id 
FROM Staff staff 
JOIN Problem_Log log ON staff.staff_id = log.assigned_to_staff_id 
JOIN Problems problem ON log.problem_id = problem.problem_id 
JOIN Product product ON problem.product_id = product.product_id 
WHERE staff.staff_first_name = 'Magali' 
AND log.log_entry_description = 'y' 
AND log.log_entry_date = '2011-11-12 23:30:53' 
AND log.log_entry_fix = 's' 
AND product.product_name = 'learn'

records.question: Which staff members have other_staff_details exactly 'p' and are assigned to problems where the log_entry_description is exactly 'c'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
WHERE problem_log.log_entry_description = 'c' AND staff.other_staff_details = 'p'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.staff_id 
FROM Staff s 
JOIN Problem_Log pl ON s.staff_id = pl.assigned_to_staff_id 
WHERE s.other_staff_details = 'p' AND pl.log_entry_description = 'c'

records.question: Which staff members are assigned to problems where the log entry description is b and the other log details are e?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
WHERE problem_log.log_entry_description = 'b' AND problem_log.other_log_details = 'e'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT assigned_to_staff_id FROM Problem_Log WHERE log_entry_description = 'b' AND other_log_details = 'e'

records.question: Which staff members named Kayla Klein with other staff details exactly p have problem logs since 1997-08-31 08:19:12 where the log entry description and other log details are exactly c and the fix is exactly y?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
WHERE problem_log.other_log_details = 'c' AND staff.staff_last_name = 'Klein' AND staff.staff_first_name = 'Kayla' AND problem_log.log_entry_description = 'c' AND problem_log.log_entry_fix = 'y' AND problem_log.log_entry_date >= '1997-08-31 08:19:12' AND staff.other_staff_details = 'p'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id
FROM Staff staff
JOIN Problem_Log log ON staff.staff_id = log.assigned_to_staff_id
WHERE staff.staff_first_name = 'Kayla'
AND staff.staff_last_name = 'Klein'
AND staff.other_staff_details = 'p'
AND log.log_entry_date > '1997-08-31 08:19:12'
AND log.log_entry_description = 'c'
AND log.log_entry_fix = 'y'

records.question: Which staff member named Magali Schumm, whose other staff details are exactly d, is assigned to problems with log entry description a, log entry fix s, other log details c, and a problem category exactly Database design or contents?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN problem_category_codes ON problem_log.problem_category_code = problem_category_codes.problem_category_code
WHERE problem_log.other_log_details = 'c' AND staff.other_staff_details = 'd' AND problem_log.log_entry_fix = 's' AND problem_category_codes.problem_category_description = 'Database design or contents.' AND problem_log.log_entry_description = 'a' AND staff.staff_last_name = 'Schumm' AND staff.staff_first_name = 'Magali'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id
FROM Staff staff
JOIN Problem_Log log ON staff.staff_id = log.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN Problems problem ON log.problem_id = problem.problem_id
WHERE staff.staff_first_name = 'Magali'
AND staff.staff_last_name = 'Schumm'
AND staff.other_staff_details = 'd'
AND log.log_entry_description = 'a'
AND log.log_entry_fix = 's'
AND log.other_log_details = 'c'
AND log.problem_category_code = (SELECT problem_category_code FROM Problem_Category_Codes WHERE problem_category_description = 'Database design or contents')

records.question: Who are the staff members named Rylan Homenick with other details as x who were assigned problems fixed with k, described as t with other details p, on or before 2011-03-13 13:11:57?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN problem_status_codes ON problem_log.problem_status_code = problem_status_codes.problem_status_code
WHERE problem_log.log_entry_description = 't' AND problem_log.other_log_details = 'p' AND staff.other_staff_details = 'x' AND problem_log.log_entry_date <= '2011-03-13 13:11:57' AND staff.staff_first_name = 'Rylan' AND problem_log.log_entry_fix = 'k' AND staff.staff_last_name = 'Homenick'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id
FROM Staff staff
JOIN Problem_Log log ON staff.staff_id = log.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN Problems problem ON log.problem_id = problem.problem_id
WHERE staff.staff_first_name = 'Rylan'
AND staff.staff_last_name = 'Homenick'
AND staff.other_staff_details = 'x'
AND log.log_entry_fix = 'k'
AND problem.problem_description = 't'
AND problem.other_problem_details = 'p'
AND log.log_entry_date <= '2011-03-13 13:11:57'

records.question: Which staff with the last name Klein and other_staff_details exactly p handled fixed problem logs with other_log_details exactly c on or after 1997-08-31 08:19:12, involving problems reported on or before 1993-12-29 23:22:21 that have other_problem_details exactly s for the wechat product?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN problems ON problem_log.problem_id = problems.problem_id
JOIN product ON problems.product_id = product.product_id
WHERE problems.other_problem_details = 's' AND problem_log.log_entry_date >= '1997-08-31 08:19:12' AND staff.other_staff_details = 'p' AND problem_log.log_entry_fix = 'y' AND problems.date_problem_reported <= '1993-12-29 23:22:21' AND staff.staff_last_name = 'Klein' AND problem_log.other_log_details = 'c' AND product.product_name = 'wechat'
records.pred_sql:

FROM Staff staff
JOIN Problem_Log log ON staff.staff_id = log.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN Problems problem ON log.problem_id = problem.problem_id
JOIN Product product ON problem.product_id = product.product_id
WHERE staff.staff_last_name = 'Klein'
AND staff.other_staff_details = 'p'
AND log.log_entry_fix = 'c'
AND log.log_entry_date >= '1997-08-31 08:19:12'
AND problem.date_problem_reported <= '1993-12-29 23:22:21'
AND problem.other_problem_details = 's'
AND product.product_name = 'wechat'
